blocks.text:
Norwegian PM → Thorbjorn Jagland (I had Solberg 0.40) -17.0 — *another* overconfidence on a plausible-but-uncertain identity pick. TW **1143.53**. 

This recurring pattern means I should **cap identity/choice favorites at ~0.30-0.33** unless strongly confirmed. Most of my big remaining predictions are current-evidence-based (Super Bowl 2-team, Winter Olympics, etc.). Let me advance and monitor the Feb clusters.

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 296 (131 resolved, 199 active)
- accuracy: 9.4% | brier skill score: 0.042 | time weighted score: 1219.70
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
